## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=moderate`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run mypy app.py`
- [ ] `uv run python -m py_compile app.py tools/bootstrap_arango.py`

## Frontend Review

- [ ] Desktop layout checked
- [ ] Mobile layout checked
- [ ] Custom Video.js controls checked
- [ ] Auth/session flow checked
- [ ] HLS player behavior checked against local or proxied stream
